articles.title: A doctor once told her not to run. Now she’s taking on the Boston Marathon.
articles.description:
is used to specify article abstract. You can only provide plain text in this element. --> More than 10 years after surgery at Mass General Hospital for a giant cell tumor in her femur, she’s running Boston in support of the hospital that helped her get there.
